label: chromium__settings-mcp-servers-actions-menu
description: KNOWN a11y debt (tracked, not accepted as correct). The open Radix DropdownMenu portals its content to <body>, which sits outside any landmark, so IBM reports aria_content_in_landmark. This is an app-wide Radix limitation (menus, unlike aria-modal dialogs, are not landmark-exempt) and <main> is overflow-hidden so the menu cannot simply portal into it. Same debt as chromium__assets-files-actions-menu. The menu's real accessibility (named trigger, keyboard open/close, focus restore) is covered by the keyboard tests in tests/a11y/mcp-servers.a11y.spec.ts. Delete this file to resurface the violation in tests/a11y/mcp-servers.a11y.spec.ts ('scans row actions menu open').

results.message: Content is not within a landmark element
